name: Matriarch of Nephthys
name_jp: ネフティスの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>悟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>り<ruby lang="jp"><rb>手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>て</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "Nephthys" monster in your GY, except "Matriarch of Nephthys"; destroy 1 card in your hand, and if you do, Special Summon the targeted monster in Defense Position, but negate its effects. During your next Standby Phase after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use each effect of "Matriarch of Nephthys" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "Nephthys" monster in your GY, except "Matriarch of Nephthys"; destroy 1 card in your hand, and if you do, Special Summon the targeted monster in Defense Position, but negate its effects. During your next Standby Phase after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use each effect of "Matriarch of Nephthys" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 Level 4 or lower "Nephthys" monster in your GY, except "Matriarch of Nephthys"; destroy 1 card in your hand, and if you do, Special Summon the targeted monster in Defense Position, but negate its effects. During your next Standby Phase after this card was destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can Special Summon this card from the GY. You can only use each effect of "Matriarch of Nephthys" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
